chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-415 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to non-prosecution of main case 15.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- None present for the petitioner. This was the position on the previous date of hearing, which shows the conduct of the petitioner not to pursue the case; rather the petitioner has lack of interest in pursuing this petition. This petition is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution. JUDGE Zahid/*
